title: Single Bamboo Pet Dog Chew Toy Strong Durable Dental Health Natural Teething with TPR
features: BAMBOO DENTAL TOY: A great chew toy, helping to strengthen the jaw, designed to entertain your dog and help to keep them happy and healthy.
DENTAL HEALTH: Promoting healthy teeth and gums, reducing the build-up of plaque and tartar.
MATERIAL: Bamboo fibre and TPR (Thermoplastic Rubber)
APPROXIMATE SIZES: Tooth/icrecream 10.5x12cm/12x7cm, dinosaur/bird 10cm x 6cm/13.5cm x 8cm and tea cup/guitar 12cm x9cm/11.5cm x 6.5cm
THREE DESIGNS: Tooth/Icecream, Dinosaur/Bird and Tea cup/Guitar. (DESIGN SENT AT RANDOM).
